nodes.norm_label: schema: customers table (storeid, name, phone, createdby, indexes)

nodes.norm_label: convex returns.ts: listbystore, getbysale, get, create (10-step atomic flow)

nodes.label: Decisions Log: 9 design decisions with rationale
nodes.norm_label: decisions log: 9 design decisions with rationale

nodes.label: Rationale: Returns immutable to avoid rabbit hole of undo-a-return
nodes.norm_label: rationale: returns immutable to avoid rabbit hole of undo-a-return

nodes.label: Rationale: Return UI is a page not a dialog — maps to 'edit the receipt' mental model
nodes.norm_label: rationale: return ui is a page not a dialog — maps to 'edit the receipt' mental model

nodes.label: Rationale: Customer optional on sale to support walk-in sales
nodes.norm_label: rationale: customer optional on sale to support walk-in sales

nodes.label: Rationale: customers table phone-keyed within store — natural unique key at counter, enables future profiles
nodes.norm_label: rationale: customers table phone-keyed within store — natural unique key at counter, enables future profiles

nodes.label: Inventory Import & Edit Fixes Design Spec
nodes.norm_label: inventory import & edit fixes design spec

nodes.label: Problem: 5 import/edit bugs (category loss, duplicates, raw ID in select, no inline create, cost==selling)
nodes.norm_label: problem: 5 import/edit bugs (category loss, duplicates, raw id in select, no inline create, cost==selling)

nodes.label: Root cause #5: get() matcher uses includes(), 'price' substring matches 'costprice' first
nodes.norm_label: root cause #5: get() matcher uses includes(), 'price' substring matches 'costprice' first

nodes.label: Fix 1: Auto-create unknown categories via categories.ensureMany mutation
nodes.norm_label: fix 1: auto-create unknown categories via categories.ensuremany mutation

nodes.label: Fix 2: Match-and-add for existing products — SKU→barcode→name strategy
nodes.norm_label: fix 2: match-and-add for existing products — sku→barcode→name strategy

nodes.label: Fix 3: Edit-page Category Select shows name (controlled value+state)
nodes.norm_label: fix 3: edit-page category select shows name (controlled value+state)

nodes.label: Fix 4: Inline '+ New Category' dialog on edit page via shared NewCategoryDialog component
nodes.norm_label: fix 4: inline '+ new category' dialog on edit page via shared newcategorydialog component

nodes.label: Fix 5: Tighten get() matcher to exact match (norm === t) instead of includes
nodes.norm_label: fix 5: tighten get() matcher to exact match (norm === t) instead of includes

nodes.label: Analytics Goal: professional real-time analytics for store owners (KPIs, charts, insights, tables)
nodes.norm_label: analytics goal: professional real-time analytics for store owners (kpis, charts, insights, tables)

nodes.label: Analytics Architecture: server page + client AnalyticsView with filter state + useQuery
nodes.norm_label: analytics architecture: server page + client analyticsview with filter state + usequery

nodes.norm_label: analytics convex api: 9 queries (kpis, dailyrevenue, weeklyrevenue, monthlyrevenue, topproducts, productshare, quantitysoldtrend, ordersbydayofweek, insights, dailysummary)

nodes.norm_label: analytics kpi grid: 12 metrics including growth %, best/lowest selling product

nodes.norm_label: analytics charts: 7 charts (daily/weekly/monthly revenue, top products bar, product share pie, quantity trend, dow orders)

nodes.norm_label: rationale: filter state in component state, url sync deferred

nodes.label: Convex AI Guidelines: function patterns, schema rules, auth, queries, mutations, actions, testing
nodes.norm_label: convex ai guidelines: function patterns, schema rules, auth, queries, mutations, actions, testing

nodes.label: Convex Auth: tokenIdentifier over subject, never accept userId as arg, ConvexProviderWithAuth
nodes.norm_label: convex auth: tokenidentifier over subject, never accept userid as arg, convexproviderwithauth

nodes.label: Convex Query Rules: no filter(), use withIndex, no collect(), no .delete(), batch deletes
nodes.norm_label: convex query rules: no filter(), use withindex, no collect(), no .delete(), batch deletes

nodes.label: Convex Schema Rules: indexes include all fields in name, no unbounded arrays in docs
nodes.norm_label: convex schema rules: indexes include all fields in name, no unbounded arrays in docs

nodes.label: Convex Action Rules: use node directive, never ctx.db in actions, separate actions file
nodes.norm_label: convex action rules: use node directive, never ctx.db in actions, separate actions file
